checkin.title: How are you feeling?
checkin.tagline: A simple 1–5 picker plus space for a note. No streak to protect.

title: Check-in
description: Log how you're feeling and see how it shifts over time.

today.title: Today
today.howAreYou: How are you feeling right now?
today.howWasDay: How were you feeling this day?

trend.empty: Log a mood to start your 14-day trend.

recent.empty: Nothing logged yet. Tap "Log mood" to add your first entry.

detail.title: Mood entry
detail.deleteError: Couldn't delete this entry. Try again.
detail.notFound: We couldn't find that mood entry.

confirmDelete.title: Delete this entry?
confirmDelete.message: This permanently removes the mood log. It can't be recovered.

welcome.title: Know your emotional weather
welcome.subtitle: A daily check-in that makes patterns visible over time.

affectLabel.title: Name it to tame it
affectLabel.body: Labelling an emotion - even with one word - reduces the brain's stress response. Logging mood is a small act with a measurable effect.

patterns.title: Spot what moves the needle
patterns.body: Daily logs reveal trends across days and weeks: what drains you, what lifts you, and how quickly you recover after hard days.

howToUse.title: How to log
howToUse.scaleBody: 1 is very low, 5 is very good - pick the number that fits how you feel right now.
howToUse.emotionsBody: Optional tags that add texture to the number.
howToUse.notesBody: Optional free-text - a trigger, a context, anything worth remembering.
